title: School accountability reform: equality impact assessment
body: "An assessment of the effect that the policies in the Schools accountability reform consultation response will have on groups with relevant protected characteristics, as well as pupils from deprived backgrounds and those who are eligible for free school meals. Topics covered include:   accountability principles school profiles support and intervention   The relevant protected characteristics, identified in the Equality Act 2010, include:   disability gender reassignment pregnancy and maternity race religion or belief sex and sexual orientation  "
